name: librarian
description: Librarian is a modern, mobile-first, self-hostable web application designed for eBook and document management. Conceived as a clean-architecture replacement for `calibre-web`, it is optimized for personal and home-lab deployments.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" -n "NUXT,NEST" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
